name: golang-gopkg-alecthomas-kingpin.v2-dev
title: golang-gopkg-alecthomas-kingpin.v2-dev
summary: command-line and flag parser for Go
description:
command-line and flag parser for Go
This package provides a fluent-style, type-safe command-line parser.
It supports flags, nested commands, positional arguments, customizable
help output using Go templates, and automatically generated man pages.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-gopkg-alecthomas-kingpin.v2-dev because command-line and flag parser for Go.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-gopkg-alecthomas-kingpin.v2-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-gopkg-alecthomas-kingpin.v2-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-gopkg-alecthomas-kingpin.v2-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
